name: ICICI Emeralde Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Invite-only card; fee waiver based on relationship value with the bank

categoryRates.description: 4 ICICI Reward Points per ₹100 spent on all retail purchases
2X Reward Points on travel bookings via ICICI portal

milestoneBenefits.benefit: Bonus reward points worth ₹10,000 + Taj InnerCircle Gold membership

loungeAccess.provider: Priority Pass / Visa Infinite Lounges / Dreamfolks

insurance.travelInsurance: Up to ₹50,00,000 comprehensive overseas medical insurance

additionalBenefits: Complimentary Culinary Treats - Buy 1 Get 1 at 1500+ restaurants
Unlimited domestic and international lounge access for primary + add-on
Complimentary golf games (4 rounds per quarter at select courses)
Meet & Greet at select airports (2 per quarter)
Visa Infinite luxury hotel collection privileges
pros: Strong travel insurance and air accident cover
cons: Invite-only card, very difficult to obtain
₹12,000 annual fee with no published waiver threshold
Reward point value is moderate unless transferred to miles
Requires maintaining significant banking relationship with ICICI
idealFor: ICICI Bank salary/wealth management customers with 30 LPA+ income

faqs.question: How do I get the ICICI Emeralde Credit Card?
faqs.answer: The Emeralde is strictly invite-only. It's typically offered to ICICI Bank wealth management customers, high-value salary accounts, or existing ICICI cardholders with very high spending (typically ₹15-20 LPA+ spend or ₹30 LPA+ income).

faqs.question: What is the Taj Epicure membership worth?
faqs.answer: The complimentary Taj InnerCircle Epicure membership is worth ₹25,000+. It provides discounts at Taj hotels (20% off on food, 15% off on rooms) and can deliver exceptional value for frequent Taj guests.

faqs.question: Is the lounge access truly unlimited?
faqs.answer: Yes, both domestic and international lounge access is unlimited for the primary cardholder and add-on cardholder through Priority Pass and Visa Infinite lounge networks.

faqs.question: How does the 1.5% forex markup compare?
faqs.answer: At 1.5%, the ICICI Emeralde has one of the lowest foreign currency markups among Indian credit cards. Most premium cards charge 2-3.5%, making this card excellent for international spends.
